title: Alternate Not Accepted Post-Bid
openingLine: I have some bad news on the Riverside project. The bids came in over budget and the alternates got cut — including the full-stage acoustic shell where Wenger was BOD. I know we worked hard on that spec. Wanted to let you know directly.
customerContext: You're the lead architect and you spec'd Wenger as BOD for the full-stage acoustic shell as a bid alternate. The base bid came in $400K over and the school cut all the alternates. You feel bad about it but you've already mentally moved on to the next phase. You're not aware that Wenger has direct-purchase pathways outside the bid.

hiddenInfo.reveal: Base bid was $400K over budget. Alternates got cut to bring it back in line.
School has a separate technology/equipment budget — about $250K — that wasn't part of the construction bid.
The principal and district performing arts director still really want the shell. They're frustrated.
Construction starts in 90 days. There's still time to procure the shell directly if they move.
CM is JKS Builders. They're flexible — they've done owner-furnished items before.
I have two other school projects in early SD. Both could use acoustic shells.
I've never used OMNIA but I've heard of it. The district might be a member — I'd need to check.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Asked why the alternates were rejected
Asked whether any budget still exists outside construction

Solution Framing.behavior: Positioned OMNIA contract as an alternative buying path
Offered a tailored layout and proposal for direct purchase

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Explored direct purchase outside the bid
Engaged the CM about an alternate procurement approach
Asked about other projects in the architect's pipeline

BANT.behavior: Confirmed remaining funds outside the construction bid
Identified school decision makers who still want the shell
Established post-bid timeline for direct procurement

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Mapped procurement timeline against the 90-day construction start

Closing & Next Steps.behavior: Committed to deliver an OMNIA proposal
Initiated direct purchase conversation with the school
